title: proof-example corpus (was jssm#817)
manager: Build a corpus of 100+ verified FSL proof examples — real machines with real proven properties — as both teaching material and a regression bed for the verification toolchain. The user flagged this as extremely valuable: it's simultaneously the evidence that FSL's proof story works, the library people learn from, and the fixtures the prover is tested against. Blocked until the proof-construct grammar is pinned.
cs: blocked on grammar-pinning (#818) + the verification toolchain; high user-flagged value
